greeting: Greetings. I guard the western gates of the capital.
If you wish to climb higher, you'll have to get past me first.
blunder: You left that piece hanging so openly I thought it was a charitable donation.
I've spent years guarding this gate. You're the first person I've seen lock themselves out.
If poor decisions were weapons, you'd be the kingdom's greatest arsenal.
check: Check. The gates are closed, and your king is on the wrong side of them.
capture: I'll be taking that. You practically handed me the keys.
promotion: Another queen? At this rate you'll conquer the board before you conquer these gates.
default: I was once a recruit like many others.
I dreamed of becoming a knight.
Years passed, but my talent never matched my ambition.
Eventually, I accepted my place as a city guard.
But protecting the people became a purpose of its own.
Not every dream changes the world.
victory: The road ahead is much harder than this. Return when your sword is sharper.
I once lost an argument to a wooden fence. The fence still defended itself better than you.
defeat: Well fought. Perhaps you'll reach the heights I never could.
